title: Cryptool partners with Kyano Digital for product development
content_html:
Cryptool is partnering with Kyano Digital, a development studio that will work alongside our team on the next stage of the platform.

Kyano Digital brings:

  • Modern product design
  • Full-stack development experience
  • Security-focused engineering
  • Smart contract development
  • API integrations
  • Database architecture

This partnership gives us extra capacity to ship the modules our community is waiting for, without compromising on quality or security.
author: Cryptool
